architectureDecision.label: Optimistic concurrency on schema version
architectureDecision.rationale: planning.module_state.updated events carry expectedStateSchemaVersion; admission rejects stale publishes with stable conflict codes.

readyReview.decision: Module state publish uses optimistic concurrency on state_schema_version (not last-writer-wins).

technicalBreakdown: Define planning.module_state.updated payload (moduleId, state_schema_version, state_json, expectedStateSchemaVersion).
Implement applier upserting workspace_module_state with version conflict detection.
Add publish hooks on allowlisted module persistence saves (improvement, agent-behavior, planning-build-session).
Add tests per module id for publish, stale conflict, and replay round-trip.

acceptanceCriteria: Only allowlisted module IDs publish planning.module_state.updated events.
Stale expectedStateSchemaVersion rejects admission/publish with a stable conflict code.
Hydrate restores module state JSON on a second machine for allowlisted modules.
Non-allowlisted module saves do not publish planning events.
